flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Sul Ross State University are 25% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($41.9k vs $55.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Sul Ross State University rose 28% between 2006 and 2009 ($4.1k → $5.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Sul Ross State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.4k vs 1.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Sul Ross State University fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6k → 1.4k).
